Open review threads

26
P1PR #114cubic-dev-ai
src/core/config/cli.rs

P1: `unique_only: bool` with `default_value_t = true` and inferred `SetTrue` action makes `--unique-only` a no-op — users cannot disable deduplication from the CLI. Use `action = ArgAction::SetFalse` instead.

P1PR #114cubic-dev-ai
src/core/config/cli.rs

P1: `include_bundles: bool` with `default_value_t = true` and inferred `SetTrue` action makes `--include-bundles` a no-op — users cannot disable bundle scanning from the CLI. Use `action = ArgAction::SetFalse` instead.

`axon` server-mode planning for `scrape` includes fields (`render_mode`, `format`, `embed`, selectors) that the server’s `/v1/scrape` handler doesn’t parse/apply (it only accepts url(s)). In server mode this makes CLI flags appear to work but they’ll be ignore

P?PR #115copilot-pull-request-reviewer
src/core/endpoints.rs:73

`uses_container_dns()` detects container endpoints via substring search on the whole URL (`url.contains(host)`). This can misclassify URLs where the substring appears in the path/query, and it won’t handle cases like different ports/credentials/IPv6 robustly.
